bride.name: Kanika
bride.bio: A free spirit with a love for the ocean, sunsets, and all things beautiful. She believes in love stories that begin with a smile.

groom.name: Abhishek
groom.bio: An adventurer at heart who found his greatest adventure in love. He promises to keep the laughter going for a lifetime.

families: Smt. Lata Devi & Shri Kamal Kapoor
blessings.daughterOf: Daughter of Mrs. Shalini & Mr. Aakash Mittal

message: We are truly delighted that you can join us on our special day. Your love, blessings, and kindness since our roka have meant the world to us. We look forward to seeing each and every one of you as we begin this beautiful journey together.

rsvp.prefilledMessage: Hi! I'd love to attend the wedding. Count me in! 🎉

thingsToKnow.title: #ForeverTogether
thingsToKnow.desc: Use our wedding hashtag on all your photos and stories

thingsToKnow.title: Weather
thingsToKnow.desc: Expected 22°C with cloudy skies — light layers recommended

thingsToKnow.title: Parking
thingsToKnow.desc: Complimentary valet parking available at the venue entrance

thingsToKnow.title: Dress Code
thingsToKnow.desc: Festive elegant — dress to celebrate in style

countdown.footerText: Our families are excited to welcome you to this joyous celebration of love.
